description_long: This rifle features a long, dark metallic barrel with a slightly weathered appearance, suggesting frequent use or age. The stock is made of wood, curving gently at the end, and displays a reddish-brown hue with visible grain texture. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, with the guard forming a protective loop beneath the action. The barrel is cylindrical and extends the full length of the rifle, with no visible attachments or modifications at the muzzle. There are no visible modern accessories such as rails, optics, or tactical grips, giving the rifle a classic, possibly antique look. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with a focus on durability and simplicity.
description: A long, classic rifle with a dark metal barrel and a curved wooden stock, featuring a simple, traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock and long metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length, with the wooden stock and metal barrel visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the slimness of the rifle's body.
